steps.label: New Intake Record Entry
steps.description: On this screen, you can create a new intake record for a client in the Social Services system. Please enter all required information about the intake, including the date, type, needs, and submitter details. Use the date picker to select the intake date, choose the appropriate intake type, and select all relevant needs from the list. Enter the submitter's name and contact information. Review your entries before submitting. All required fields are marked with an asterisk (*). Once you submit, the system will process the intake and guide you to the next step.

fields.label: Intake Needs
fields.error_message: At least one Intake Need must be selected.

data_validation: Intake Date cannot be in the future.
At least one Intake Need must be selected.
Contact Information must be a valid phone number or email address.
First and Last Name fields cannot be blank.
If Intake Type is 'Emergency', at least one Intake Need must be selected.
Middle Name is optional but cannot contain numbers or special characters.

buttons.label: Submit Intake
buttons.description: Click to submit the intake record and proceed to assignment.

steps.label: Submit Intake Record
steps.description: When the 'Submit Intake' button is clicked by the Intake Worker, the system must validate and capture all entered data fields, then create a new intake record in the system. The system must store the Intake Date, Intake Type, Intake Needs, and Intake Submitter details (First Name, Middle Name if provided, Last Name, and Contact Information). Additionally, the system must trigger any required system-initiated actions such as audit logging and compliance documentation as part of this process.

rules.label: Validate Required Fields
rules.logic: Upon clicking 'Submit Intake', the system must verify that all required fields (Intake Date, Intake Type, Intake Needs, Intake Submitter First Name, Intake Submitter Last Name, Intake Submitter Contact Information) are populated. If any required field is missing, prevent submission and display an appropriate error message.

rules.label: Capture Intake Data
rules.logic: If all required fields are valid, the system must capture the values of Intake Date, Intake Type, Intake Needs, Intake Submitter First Name, Intake Submitter Middle Name (if provided), Intake Submitter Last Name, and Intake Submitter Contact Information.

rules.label: Create Intake Record
rules.logic: The system must create a new intake record in the database using the captured data fields.

rules.label: Audit Logging
rules.logic: The system must generate an audit log entry recording the creation of the new intake record, including timestamp, Intake Worker identity, and all submitted field values.

rules.label: Compliance Documentation
rules.logic: The system must trigger any required compliance documentation processes associated with the creation of a new intake record, as per organizational or regulatory requirements.
